metadata.title: Mitsyy — AI-powered university study platform
metadata.description: Organize your curriculum, notes, and exams with AI that understands your classes. The university student's copilot for Peru and LATAM.

landing.title: Mitsyy
landing.heroTitle: University demands more. So does Mitsyy.
landing.heroSubtitle: Organize your curriculum, upload your notes, and study with AI that understands your classes—not Google. For midterms, research, and real campus life.
landing.featuresSubtitle: From curriculum to midterm: fewer scattered apps, more focus on what matters.
landing.feature1Title: Ask what class didn't clear up
landing.feature1Desc: Your copilot answers with context from your courses and readings—like a classmate who never missed a lecture.
landing.feature2Desc: Flashcards ready before the exam, generated from what you're actually studying.
landing.feature3Title: Rehearse the midterm before the midterm
landing.feature3Desc: Smart quizzes to find gaps and show up confident.
landing.feature4Desc: Build your course plan, track subjects, tasks, and your term calendar in one place.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Three steps. A term under control.
landing.step1Desc: Define your major, subjects, and academic week in one place.
landing.step2Desc: Syllabi, readings, and notes—your copilot understands them to help for real.
landing.step3Desc: Chat, flashcards, quizzes, and summaries when you need them—without switching apps.
landing.communityDesc: Post questions, share templates, and connect with classmates in your major.
landing.finalCtaTitle: Your copilot is ready. Start free.
landing.finalCtaSubtitle: No card required. In minutes your curriculum is set and your first course is connected.
landing.ctaUrgency: No credit card · Set up in 1 minute
landing.footerDescription: Mitsyy is the university copilot for Peru and LATAM: curriculum, courses, community, and AI that studies with you.
landing.testimonial1Quote: I set up my curriculum in Mitsyy and had Calculus flashcards ready before the midterm. It saved my grade.
landing.testimonial2Quote: It's my study copilot—I ask specific questions without rereading thirty pages of readings.
landing.testimonial3Quote: I generated a quiz from my Constitutional Law notes and reviewed on the bus. Very practical.
landing.testimonial4Quote: Having courses, community, and AI study in one app ended the chaos of a thousand open tabs.
landing.heroImageAlt: Mitsyy view: courses, copilot chat, and review tools
landing.featureChatAlt: Illustration of study copilot chat in Mitsyy
landing.featureCardsAlt: Illustration of review flashcards in Mitsyy

landingPricing.title: Study smarter, not longer
landingPricing.subtitle: AI to review, research, and walk into midterms with an edge. Start free; Plus and Pro unlock your copilot without limits.
landingPricing.studentNote: Prices in PEN · Built for the academic term

pricing.title: Supercharge your study with AI
pricing.subtitle: Organize courses, review with quizzes and flashcards. Free covers the essentials; Plus and Pro unlock unlimited AI.
pricing.mockSuccess: {plan} plan activated (simulation). Culqi integration coming soon.
pricing.culqiComingSoon: Real payments will run through Culqi once your business account is active.

free.name: Free
free.tagline: Perfect for the term, no card needed

pro.name: Pro
pro.tagline: Advanced AI to ace the term

features.aiFlashcards: Generate flashcards from PDFs or notes
features.aiCreditsUnlimited: Unlimited AI credits to generate study material
features.earlyAccess: Early access to new AI features

changePlan.a: Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade anytime; changes prorate on your next billing cycle.

paymentMethods.q: What payment methods do you accept?
paymentMethods.a: With Culqi: credit and debit cards, Yape, PagoEfectivo, and more depending on what you enable.

cancel.a: Yes, no lock-in. You keep access until the paid period ends, then return to Free.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to your Mitsyy account
auth.welcomeBackSubtitle: Sign in to pick up where you left off.
auth.createAccountSubtitle: Start free in under a minute. No credit card.
auth.passwordHint: At least 4 characters. Mix letters and numbers for stronger security.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 4 characters.
auth.errorGoogleSignIn: Could not sign in with Google
auth.brandTagline: Your academic second brain. Notes, classes and community in one place.
auth.bridgeFinishingSubtitle: We are syncing your session with the server.
auth.bridgeErrorTitle: We could not connect your account
auth.bridgeNoBackendToken: The server did not return a valid session.
auth.bridgeUnknownError: An unexpected error occurred while connecting your account.
auth.bridgeConfigError: The service is not configured correctly. Please let us know so we can look into it.
auth.bridgeBackendUnreachable: We could not reach our servers. Please try again in a moment.
auth.bridgeGoogleInvalid: The Google account is not valid. Make sure your Google email is verified and try again.

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Your companion for organizing routines and spaces. Let's get everything set up for you.

onboarding.successMessage: Your spaces have been created. You can use the dashboard now.
onboarding.errorCreate: Some spaces could not be created. Please try again.

studentPlan.title: My plan
studentPlan.freeDescription: Free university account: courses, community, and monthly limits on quizzes, flashcards, and AI.
studentPlan.plusDescription: Unlimited quizzes and flashcards, plus AI summaries and generation for review.
studentPlan.proDescription: AI tutor, quiz generator, and exam mode to prepare for midterms and finals.
studentPlan.upgradeHint: Go Plus for unlimited · Pro for advanced AI
studentPlan.usageSubtitle: Resets each cycle. Upgrade to remove limits.
studentPlan.chooseSubtitle: Compare quizzes, flashcards, and AI. Pick what fits your term.
studentPlan.freeDescriptionShort: Monthly limits on quizzes, flashcards, and AI.
studentPlan.proDescriptionShort: AI tutor, quiz generator, and exam mode.

checkin.subtitle: Daily check-in
checkin.title: How are you feeling today?
checkin.description: 5 seconds. Helps us support you while you study.
checkin.disclaimer: A self-awareness tool. Not a substitute for professional medical or mental health care.

studentHome.checkInReminderDesc: Tap to log your mood before studying.
studentHome.noClassesTodayDesc: Add classes in your calendar to see them here.
studentHome.noTasksDesc: Tasks from your calendar will show up here.

studentTasks.title: Tasks
studentTasks.empty: You have no tasks yet. Create one with «New task».
studentTasks.emptySubtitle: Organize work by course, due date, and priority. They'll show in list, kanban, and calendar once created.
studentTasks.emptyTip1: Add title, course, and deadline in seconds.
studentTasks.emptyTip2: Use the calendar to see what's due each week.
studentTasks.emptyTip3: Completing a task adds to your task streak and XP.
studentTasks.sidebarTip1: Create tasks here or from a course's Tasks tab.
studentTasks.sidebarTip2: Drag cards in kanban to update status instantly.
studentTasks.sidebarTip3: Complete a task today to start your streak.
studentTasks.sidebarStreakHint: Your weekly progress will show here.
studentTasks.setupWorkspace: Set up your study workspace to manage tasks.

studentCalendar.title: Calendar

editor.readOnlyTaskHint: This task is managed in the Tasks view.

editor.timeError: End time must be after start time.

studentCourses.emptyCurrentCycle: No courses in cycle {roman}. Check your map or try another filter.

studentCourses.emptySubtitle: Create courses from your curriculum and they'll appear here.

studentCourses.formAcademicCycleHint: Semester in your curriculum this course belongs to.
studentCourses.modalSubtitle: Set up your course for this term
studentCourses.modalityBlendedHint: You can set in-person and remote days inside the course after it is created.
studentCourses.schedulePerDayExplainer: Use this when one day is evening and another is afternoon.
studentCourses.schedulePickDaysHint: Select class days above, then set the time for each.
studentCourses.scheduleTimeOrderError: End time must be after start time.
studentCourses.scheduleTimeOrderErrorDay: On {day}, end time must be after start time.
studentCourses.confirmDeleteCourseMessage: You're about to delete the course "{name}". Its notes, tasks, files and flashcards will be lost. This action cannot be undone.

studentWellbeing.title: Wellbeing
studentWellbeing.factorsHelp: What influenced how you feel? (pick any or none)

dailyAction.waiting: Tell me how you feel and I'll plan your day.
dailyAction.stressedExam: Breathe with me for 2 minutes, then 25 min of light review. No marathon today.
dailyAction.goodEnergy: Good time to move forward. A 25-min pomodoro on {course}?
dailyAction.restDay: Rest today — you've earned it. If you want, just review flashcards for 5 min.
dailyAction.stableDay: A steady day. A short session keeps your rhythm without pressure.
dailyAction.fallback: A small step today is still progress. Let's go gently.
dailyAction.nightReflection: How was your day? Let's reflect together.

todaySummary.nightClosure: How was your day? Let's close it with a quick reflection.

timeline.title: Your day today
timeline.empty: Use the tools above to build your day.

actions.sectionTitle: What do you want to do now?

journalPrompts.hardTopic: Which topic was hardest for you this week?
journalPrompts.smallWin: What was your small win today?
journalPrompts.energyDrain: What drains your study energy most and how can you reduce it?
journalPrompts.examPrep: If your exam were tomorrow, what would you review first?
journalPrompts.focusBlocker: What distraction hurt your focus the most today and how will you prevent it tomorrow?
journalPrompts.classClarity: Which part of class became clearer today, and which part still feels fuzzy?
journalPrompts.studyMomentum: What small habit helped you keep study momentum today?
journalPrompts.nextStep: What's the smallest next step to move your course forward?
journalPrompts.timeUse: Where did most of your time go today, and what would you adjust?
journalPrompts.reviewPriority: Which topic deserves a short review tonight?
journalPrompts.helpNeeded: Which academic topic would benefit most from asking for help this week?
journalPrompts.deepWork: Which 25-minute focus block do you want to protect tomorrow?
journalPrompts.consistency: What did you do today that moved you a little closer to your exam goal?
journalPrompts.checkpoint: If you rate your academic day from 1 to 5, where are you and why?
journalPrompts.tomorrowPlan: What concrete objective do you want to complete tomorrow?

progress.title: Your wellbeing over time
progress.empty: Not enough data yet. Log your mood for a few days.

tips.water: Drink water before each study session
tips.sleep: Sleep 7-8 hours before an exam — don't pull an all-nighter
tips.walk: Take a 10-minute walk if you feel overwhelmed
tips.stretch: Stretch your neck and shoulders every hour of study
tips.screenBreak: Look away from the screen for 20 seconds every 20 minutes
tips.gratitude: Note one positive thing from your day, however small
tips.breathing: Take three deep breaths before starting a hard task

studentWellbeing.emotionalCheckInStreak: {count, plural, =0 {Start your wellbeing streak today} one {You have tracked your mood for # day} other {You have tracked your mood for # days}}
studentWellbeing.emotionalCheckInStreakHint: Tracks the habit of logging your mood, not whether you're happy
studentWellbeing.emotionalCheckInBestStreak: {count, plural, one {Best streak: # day} other {Best streak: # days}}

correlation.insight1: You study better on days you feel 'Good' or 'Excellent'.
correlation.insight2: Your 'Bad' days often follow nights with little sleep.
correlation.insight3: You've logged your mood for 12 days. That's already self-care.
correlation.insight3Dynamic: You've logged your mood for {count} days. That's already self-care.
correlation.buildingBody: Mitsyy needs to know you better. Complete check-ins for 7 days to discover your patterns.

studentWellbeing.pomodoroSessionComplete: Session complete. Take care of your mind.
studentWellbeing.disclaimer: Content focused on self-awareness. Not a diagnosis and does not replace professional care.
studentWellbeing.previewDisclaimer: This is a temporary preview for design review. Authentication is not included.

pomodoro.panelHint: Pick a duration and start. Syncs with Wellbeing.
pomodoro.breakSubtitle: Use these minutes to move and take care of your body.

studentStudy.chatFailedUnknown: Check the file and try again.

studentStudy.needPdfReady: Upload a document and wait until processing finishes (status: ready).

routines.openTemplate: Open each workspace's weekly template to edit it.
routines.noWorkspacesWithRoutine: You don't have any workspaces with a routine. Create a workspace (Skincare, Fitness or General) from the side menu.
routines.confirmDeleteRoutine: Delete this routine and all its content? This cannot be undone.

routineBuilder.title: Your skincare routine
routineBuilder.subtitle: Build a calm weekly rhythm inspired by dermatology.
routineBuilder.routineContextDescription: Your skin type and goals are used to personalise product suggestions and the «Auto-build routine» option.
routineBuilder.routineContextSubtitle: Build a calm, consistent skincare rhythm with contextual guidance.
routineBuilder.clinicalInsightsDescription: Dermatology-based tips for your routine (step order, what not to mix, etc.).

insights.pmCleanser: A gentle cleanser usually starts a strong PM flow.

routineBuilder.insightAmSunscreenOk: Sunscreen closes your morning routine correctly.
routineBuilder.insightAmSunscreenMiss: Add sunscreen to close your morning routine.
routineBuilder.insightPmCleanser: A gentle cleanser is a great start to your night routine.
routineBuilder.insightPmDoubleExfoliant: Two exfoliating products appear in the same night.
routineBuilder.insightPmRetinoidExfoliant: Consider separating retinoid and exfoliant nights.
routineBuilder.insightTipAntioxidant: Consider adding an antioxidant serum in the morning.
routineBuilder.conflictMessageHighConcentrations: In high concentrations they may cause redness in some skin. Try at different times or use stable formulations.
routineBuilder.conflictIntro: These two ingredients are best not used in the same moment. Below shows which day and moment they appear together and which product contributes each one.
routineBuilder.insightsBalanced: Your routine structure looks balanced. Keep consistency and adjust based on tolerance.
routineBuilder.intelligenceNoConflicts: No conflicts detected between ingredients in this routine.
routineBuilder.intelligenceNoSuggestions: No suggestions right now. Your routine is well structured.
routineBuilder.intelligenceDuplicateFunction: Two products of the same step in the same routine may not be necessary.
routineBuilder.intelligenceRecommendationSpf: SPF is recommended to finish a morning routine.
routineBuilder.suggestionAddSunscreen: Add sunscreen to close your morning routine
routineBuilder.suggestionAddPmCleanser: Add a gentle cleanser to start your night routine
routineBuilder.tipCleanse30Sec: Wash your face for about 30 seconds for effective cleansing.
routineBuilder.tipSerumDampSkin: Apply serum on slightly damp skin for better absorption.
routineBuilder.tipSunscreenReapply: Reapply sunscreen every 2 hours when exposed to the sun.
routineBuilder.confirmClearRoutine: All products will be removed from the routine. The structure (morning/night per day) will stay, but you will have no products. This cannot be undone.
routineBuilder.replaceProductSubtitle: Choose another product from the catalog to replace this step in your routine.
routineBuilder.replaceSuccessMessage: The routine step was updated successfully.
routineBuilder.changeFrequencyDescription: Choose which days and time of day you want to use this product.
routineBuilder.replaceWithAnother: Or choose another product to replace
routineBuilder.frequencyUpdatedMessage: Updated which days you use this product.
routineBuilder.addProductToRoutineSubtitle: Select a product and define when to use it.
routineBuilder.whenToUse: When do you want to use this product?
routineBuilder.buildFromScratchDesc: Create your routine step by step choosing each product manually.
routineBuilder.smartStarterRoutineDesc: Generate a dermatologist-inspired routine adapted to your skin type.
routineBuilder.skinCyclingTemplateDesc: Balance exfoliation, retinoids and recovery nights during the week.
routineBuilder.productFirstBuilderDesc: Organize your existing products into a coherent weekly routine.
routineBuilder.readFullWeekAtGlance: Read your full week at a glance.
routineBuilder.contextAwareSuggestions: Context-aware suggestions for your morning/night flow.
routineBuilder.noRoutineYet: You don't have a routine yet.
routineBuilder.productAlreadyInDaySlot: This product is already in this day and time. Add it only once per morning or night.

catalog.noProducts: No products found. Try adjusting filters or search.

workspace.confirmDeleteWorkspaceMessage: If you delete this workspace, all routines created in it will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
workspace.noPagesYet: No pages yet. Create one to get started.
workspace.onboardingDescription: Introduce one new product at a time and patch test when possible.
workspace.weeklyRoutineEmpty: Your routine is empty. Organize morning and night by day.
workspace.weeklyRoutineHint: Organize your week: morning and night. Edit days and add your routine steps.

workspaceNav.completeAmPmToAddDays: Complete AM or PM routine to add days.
workspaceNav.productsAndArticlesByProfile: Products and articles based on your skin profile.
workspaceNav.fromThisSpaceAddToRoutine: From this space. Add them to your routine from here.
workspaceNav.learnEmptyArticles: No articles yet. Content will appear when available.
workspaceNav.learnEmptyVideos: No videos yet. Content will appear when available.
workspaceNav.noInsightsYet: Complete your routine and journal to see insights.

workspaceNav.myProductsDescription: Products in your routine. Add more from the catalog.

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.subtitle: Manage your account and preferences.
settingsPage.photoHint: JPG, PNG or GIF. Max. 2 MB.
settingsPage.name: Name
settingsPage.emptyDescription: This section has no options yet.
settingsPage.comingSoonSectionDescription: This section will be available soon.
settingsPage.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 4 characters

prompts.title: Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Manage and reuse prompts for debugging, refactor, testing, and more.
prompts.empty: You don't have any prompts yet. Create one to get started.
prompts.emptyHint: Use the button below or «New prompt» to create your first prompt.
prompts.selectPromptToPreview: Select a prompt to view its content
prompts.formCategoryHint: Predefined categories. Use tags for your own labels.
prompts.formStatusHelp: Active: visible in All and search. Draft: hidden from lists; useful for work in progress. Archived: only visible in Archived view.
prompts.tip1: Be specific about context: include tech stack, file names, or constraints.
prompts.tip2: Include input/output examples so the model knows the format you want.
prompts.tip3: State the desired format (list, code block, steps) in the prompt.
prompts.tip4: Break complex tasks into smaller prompts for better results.
prompts.tip5: Mention "don't change behavior" when you only want refactors or docs.
